[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 00101000 2
1 00001110 3
2 00000000 a
3 00000000 a
4 00000000 a
5 00000000 a
6 00000000 a
7 10010010 3

01 10 10010000 2

23 32 00000000 a match 2 3 4 5 6
34 43 00100001 2

56 65 00100000 1
67 76 00001000 1
70 07 00000010 1

35 53 10100001 3
46 64 00101000 2 match 0

71 17 00000000 a match 2 3 4 5 6

50 05 10000000 1
